hints.text: Plates: **long white front / short yellow rear**
Gen3 car front visible as **blue-white-red patches** (French-flag-like, red most distinct — unique to Sri Lanka); Gen4 = all **low-cam**
Scripts: **Sinhala** (curvy/rounded, everywhere) + **Tamil** (straighter lines, north/east) + some English
Concrete poles: square w/ **pinholes only near the top** (Thailand's reach the bottom) + **holey poles** (large holes on lower half — unique)
**Short wide tapered stone bollards** (black base, white top — unique); tall white waystones w/ a yellow road number
**Black-and-white striped signposts** (also BD/BT/IN/NP/MY); rural roads often have outer lines but no middle line
Tropical **lush green**, dense agriculture; **reddish soil** common (sometimes white sandy)
**Palm trees** very common; orange/red tiled roofs (often brownish from wear)
Majority **Buddhist** (temples, stupas, Buddhist flag); bulky **tuk-tuks with a black roof** (green/yellow/red)
Phone area codes (10-digit); religion by region: Buddhism most; **Hinduism + Tamil → north/east & Nuwara Eliya**; Islam = east coast; Christianity = NW (Mannar)
